User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user profile in the chat app

displayName.description: The display name of the user

email.description: The primary email address of the user

photoURL.description: The avatar URL for the user profile

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of the user last being active

pushToken.description: In-app simulated or browser Push notification permission token

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: Represents a chat channel or conversation room

description.description: Purpose or description of the channel

type.description: Types of channels: group public chat or DM

memberIds.description: Array of member UIDs for private/direct messaging

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a chat message sent in a channel

roomId.description: The channel or room ID this message belongs to

senderName.description: Display name of the sender at the time of send

senderPhoto.description: Avatar of the sender at the time of send

content.description: The textual content of the message

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the message was sent

users/{userId}.description: The main collection storing public and private profile data of users

channels/{channelId}.description: Chat channels and DM groups information

channels/{channelId}/messages/{messageId.description: The subcollection containing individual messages sent inside a high-level chat channel
